title: AI Talk Placeholder
description: Later this page will answer recruiter questions from the published resume, public blogs, and curated knowledge materials.
syncingSnapshot: Syncing the latest published snapshot in the background...

ready.title: The entry and product meaning come first
ready.lineOne: This round does not wire up the real Q&A backend yet. It only establishes the public-site entry and future capability boundary.
ready.lineTwo: The next step will use the published resume, public blogs, and knowledge materials as retrieval context.
ready.lineThree: Once the RAG flow is ready, this page will grow an input area, answer cards, cited source snippets, and feedback actions.

prompts.title: Questions it should answer later
prompts.one: What projects has he focused on in recent years?
prompts.two: Is he more frontend-oriented or full-stack?
prompts.three: What should an interviewer ask about next?
